title: Image
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The McCosker Creek Restoration project is the largest creek restoration project in the East Bay Regional Park District’s history.",
    "The project restores 3,000 linear feet of natural stream channel that has been covered up and culverted for the last 60 years.",
    "The stream restoration design will model the predicted pattern, profile, and dimension of a natural stream specific to the valley.",
    "The project aims to create a low-maintenance, sustainable riparian and in-stream habitat while considering a changing climate.",
    "The project will create riparian habitat that can support up to ten special status wildlife species.",
    "Special status wildlife species that may benefit from the restored habitat include the California red-legged frog, golden eagle, Cooper’s hawk, California foothill yellow-legged frog, Alameda whipsnake, and San Francisco Dusky-footed Wood Rat."
  ]
}
```
